overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a dark forest at night. The character travels from a grassy meadow with a rock wall, up a grassy hillside, and into a dense pine forest along a winding dirt path. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with low blue-green lighting typical of the game's night cycle.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow with dirt path and rock wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through a grassy meadow with a rock wall on the left side

entered.detail: large rock formation running parallel to the path on the left side
narrow dirt trail winding through the grassy meadow
open field with tall grass surrounding the path
sparse pine trees visible in the distance against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path through an open grassy meadow at night. A rock wall runs along the left side of the path while scattered pine trees are visible in the distance. The scene is wide open with full sky visibility and low ambient lighting.

events.description: character leaves the dirt path and begins ascending the grassy hillside

agents.ego_description: climbing uphill through tall grass away from the main path, moving toward the hilltop

entered.detail: steep hillside covered in tall wild grass
bare dead tree trunks standing on the right side of the slope
dark open sky visible at the top of the ascent

segments.scene_description: Leaving the meadow path behind, the character ascends a grassy hillside through tall wild grass. Dead tree trunks stand on the right side of the slope as the character climbs toward the open hilltop. The terrain shifts from a defined trail to open grassland.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail through dense pine woods

events.description: reaches the top of the hill and enters a denser forested area with a defined path

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow dirt path through a dark pine forest, continuing straight ahead through the trees

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
tall dense pine trees lining the left side of the path
tall dense pine trees lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Reaching the hilltop, the scene transitions to a dense pine forest with a narrow dirt path. Tall pine trees line both sides of the trail, creating a semi-covered canopy that partially obscures the night sky. The character continues walking forward through the dark woods as the dead trees from the hillside fade into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, moonlit meadow into the claustrophobic depths of a dense pine forest. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path flanked by a rock wall, where the wide-open landscape allows for full visibility of the night sky. As the character leaves the defined trail, the scene shifts to an ascent up a grassy hillside, moving through tall wild grass and past skeletal dead tree trunks. Upon reaching the hilltop, the environment opens briefly before immediately narrowing into a thick pine forest. The camera then follows the character deep into the woods along a winding path, where the towering trees form a heavy canopy that obscures the sky and replaces the open meadow with dark, atmospheric shadows.
